title: Collection Kind
description: What kind of content program a collection represents. Determines how installments should be interpreted by buyer agents.

enumDescriptions.series: TV or podcast program; installments are episodes
enumDescriptions.publication: Print or newsletter title; installments are issues
enumDescriptions.event_series: Live event program; installments are individual event airings
enumDescriptions.rotation: DOOH scheduling container; installments are scheduling periods
